definitions.text: Symbol for attosecond, an SI unit of time equal to 10 seconds.
To such an extent or degree; to the same extent or degree.
examples: She regards her kids as (being) as holy as saints.
You’re not as tall as I am, but you are definitely as happy as can be.

definitions.text: Considered to be, in relation to something else; in the relation (specified).
In the (same) way or manner that; to the (same) degree that.
examples: I'm under a lot of pressure, as you know.

definitions.text: Used after so or as to introduce a comparison.
examples: She's twice as strong as I was two years ago.
It's not so complicated as I expected.

definitions.text: Used to introduce a result: with the result that it is; as to
Introducing a basis of comparison, with an object in the objective case.
examples: You are not as tall as my sister.
What is your opinion as a parent?
As your big sis, I worry about your life too.
I bought you a new toy as a special treat.

definitions.text: Any of several coins of Rome, coined in bronze or later copper; or the equivalent value.
Used to intensify an adjective; very much; extremely
